label: Cyberpunk 2077
blurb: Night City, 2077. Mercs, rockerboys and fixers — name who said the line.

quotes.q: Wake up, Samurai. We have a city to burn.
quotes.hint: The line that revealed Keanu Reeves at E3 2019

quotes.q: Goodbye, V. And never stop fighting.
quotes.hint: His last words crossing the bridge with Alt

quotes.q: Here, for folks like us? Wrong city, wrong people.
quotes.hint: His verdict on happy endings in Night City

quotes.q: Gonna miss you, V. You were the only one who ever gave a damn.
quotes.hint: Final words in the Delamain cab after the heist

quotes.q: See, V? I told you. We're gonna be legends.
quotes.hint: Said mid-heist, moments before it all goes wrong

quotes.q: Or go down for all times in a blaze of glory?
quotes.hint: The fixer's question at the Afterlife bar

quotes.q: I'm sorry, V. I'm just... I'm just a girl from the Badlands.
quotes.hint: A Nomad's confession in Queen of the Highway

quotes.q: The wider the smile, the bigger the lies.
quotes.hint: The corporate samurai on Yorinobu's press conferences

quotes.q: Every choice you make, every lie you tell... it all adds up.
quotes.hint: Said during Pyramid Song, out on the water
